title: Reimagining Nursing Theories in the Age of Artificial Intelligence: Preserving the Human Essence Amid Digital Transformation.
summary: The exponential growth of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare has sparked both enthusiasm and apprehension within the nursing discipline. While AI promises to enhance clinical efficiency, accuracy, and decision-making, it simultaneously challenges nursing's humanistic foundations, its ethical...
